probes.name: staff-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms every migration this module ships has run: staff, coaches, staff_compensation_history + their indexes (partial unique on (tenant_id, user_id, deleted_at IS NULL) + partial unique on (branch_id, is_branch_manager=true, employment_status='active', deleted_at IS NULL)).

probes.name: staff-branch-manager-invariant-index-present
probes.description: Confirms the partial unique index on (branch_id, is_branch_manager=true, employment_status='active', deleted_at IS NULL) exists. Without it, concurrent promotions could both succeed + violate the one-manager-per-branch invariant.

probes.name: staff-compensation-history-table-present
probes.description: Confirms the dedicated staff_compensation_history table exists (separate from the normal audits table). Missing this means every compensation write silently lands in the normal audits table + loses the 7-year financial-record retention guarantee.

probes.name: staff-branch-manager-invariant-clean
probes.description: Runs the same query as ReconcileBranchManagerInvariantJob. Any finding is a P1 signal (multiple active managers per branch, or a manager not in 'active' state).

probes.name: staff-orphan-staff-detection
probes.description: Detects Staff rows with employment_status='active' referencing a User with deleted_at != NULL (would violate the PreventUserArchiveWithActiveStaff hook if it ran retroactively — indicates a historical drift).

probes.name: staff-pending-hire-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 50 Staff rows are stuck in employment_status='pre_hire' for > staff.hire.pre_hire_ttl_days (default 60 days). Indicates HR onboarding backlog OR a broken email-verification flow blocking activations.

probes.name: staff-large-compensation-delta-frequency
probes.description: Counts `staff.manage.compensation.large-delta` bypass events in the last 24h. Elevated frequency is a signal — either a mass payroll adjustment (legitimate) or a permission being over-granted (drift).

probes.name: staff-compensation-history-write-latency
probes.description: P99 write latency on staff_compensation_history. Should be < 50ms — this is a small table with append-only writes; latency drift indicates disk pressure or lock contention.

probes.name: staff-coach-certification-expiry-processing-lag
probes.description: Detects Coach.certifications entries whose expires_at < today() - 24h but expired_at is still null (ExpireCoachCertificationsJob missed the transition). Any finding indicates the daily job has stalled.
